## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include screenshots if applicable.

## Sample Email (if classification bug)

If this is about an email being classified incorrectly, paste a **redacted** version below.
**⚠️ Remove all personal information:** your name, email address, company names you want private, etc.


## Environment

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Self-hosted or hosted version?
- Node version (if applicable):
- Java version (if applicable):
